intro.speaker: Leo
intro.text: Today's the day. Donut House closes at 5pm.

intro.speaker: Leo
intro.text: I need to get Warren, MJ, Carson, and Justin first.

warren_meet.speaker: Warren
warren_meet.text: Leo! I heard you were going to Donut House!

warren_meet.speaker: Warren
warren_meet.text: I'm in. But Grace is out front and she's got a pool noodle...

warren_after_grace.speaker: Warren
warren_after_grace.text: YES! She's down! I saw the whole thing from the window!

warren_after_grace.speaker: Leo
warren_after_grace.text: Your sister hits hard. Come on, let's go.

warren_after_grace.speaker: Warren
warren_after_grace.text: I've got my slingshot. Nobody's stopping us now.

warren_join.speaker: Warren
warren_join.text: That's what I'm talking about! Let's go get those donuts.

warren_join.speaker: Warren
warren_join.text: I've got my slingshot. Nobody's stopping us now.

mj_meet.speaker: MJ
mj_meet.text: Donut run?! Say no more. I'm so in.

mj_meet.speaker: MJ
mj_meet.text: My brother Max has been blocking the driveway all morning.

mj_join.speaker: MJ
mj_join.text: I'll push anything out of our way. Let's ride.

carson_meet.speaker: Carson
carson_meet.text: I saw you coming from two blocks away.

carson_meet.speaker: Carson
carson_meet.text: Donut House. I knew it. I'm ready.

carson_meet.speaker: Carson
carson_meet.text: Nora's around back by the pool. She's in a mood.

carson_join.speaker: Carson
carson_join.text: Didn't even see it coming. That's my whole thing.

carson_join.speaker: Carson
carson_join.text: Stay close and stay quiet. I know the shortcuts.

carson_after_nora.speaker: Carson
carson_after_nora.text: SHE'S DOWN! I've been waiting for that all summer.

carson_after_nora.speaker: Leo
carson_after_nora.text: How long was she hiding in those cabinets?!

carson_after_nora.speaker: Carson
carson_after_nora.text: Like... all day. She takes this very seriously.

carson_after_nora.speaker: Carson
carson_after_nora.text: Alright, I'm in. Let's go get those donuts.

justin_meet.speaker: Justin
justin_meet.text: BRO. I've been waiting all week for a donut run.

justin_meet.speaker: Justin
justin_meet.text: Max is guarding the street with a bat. AND he's somehow electric?

justin_meet.speaker: Justin
justin_meet.text: I know. Doesn't matter. Let's go.

justin_join.speaker: Justin
justin_join.text: YEAH! Full crew! Nobody's faster than us.

justin_join.speaker: Justin
justin_join.text: I'll get us there in no time. Follow me!

justin_after_max.speaker: Justin
justin_after_max.text: BRO. You just beat my electric brother with a FART.

justin_after_max.speaker: Justin
justin_after_max.text: He's been doing that zap thing since he found those batteries.

justin_after_max.speaker: Justin
justin_after_max.text: OK. Full squad. Let's GO. Donuts won't wait forever.

departure.speaker: Leo
departure.text: Full squad. Donut House is 3 miles east. Let's move.

departure.speaker: Warren
departure.text: I've got snacks and a full slingshot. Ready.

departure.speaker: MJ
departure.text: If anything gets in our way, I'll deal with it.

departure.speaker: Carson
departure.text: Quiet and fast. That's how we do this.

departure.speaker: Justin
departure.text: LAST ONE THERE BUYS THE DONUTS. LET'S GOOOO.

arrival.speaker: Justin
arrival.text: I CAN SEE IT. I CAN SEE DONUT HOUSE!

arrival.speaker: Leo
arrival.text: We made it. Nobody eat until we're inside.

arrival.speaker: Warren
arrival.text: That was rougher than I expected. Worth it.

checkpoint_school.speaker: Leo
checkpoint_school.text: Tega Cay Elementary. Almost forgot I went here.

checkpoint_school.speaker: Justin
checkpoint_school.text: KEEP MOVING! No time for nostalgia!

checkpoint_tire.speaker: MJ
checkpoint_tire.text: No time. The bikes are fine. Mostly.

checkpoint_petsupply.speaker: Leo
checkpoint_petsupply.text: Almost there. Pet Supply Store is right before Donut House.

checkpoint_petsupply.speaker: Carson
checkpoint_petsupply.text: Something just came out of that store...

gauntlet_grace.speaker: Grace
gauntlet_grace.text: You made it back?! Hand over those donuts RIGHT NOW.

gauntlet_grace.speaker: Leo
gauntlet_grace.text: We rode 3 miles for these. We fought for these. You're not getting them.

gauntlet_grace.speaker: Grace
gauntlet_grace.text: Then I'm taking them. Pool noodle round TWO.

gauntlet_max_football.speaker: Max
gauntlet_max_football.text: Ooh. Donuts. Hand them over and nobody gets a stiff arm.

gauntlet_max_football.speaker: Leo
gauntlet_max_football.text: Back off, Max. We earned every single one.

gauntlet_max_football.speaker: Max
gauntlet_max_football.text: I'm blocking this street all day. Give me the bag.

gauntlet_nora.speaker: Nora
gauntlet_nora.text: I knew you'd come back this way. I've been in these bushes for an hour.

gauntlet_nora.speaker: Leo
gauntlet_nora.text: Nora. Get out of the way.

gauntlet_nora.speaker: Nora
gauntlet_nora.text: Not a chance. Drop the donuts and I'll let the rest of you pass.

gauntlet_max_baseball.speaker: JustinMax
gauntlet_max_baseball.text: BRO. You brought DONUTS past my block without offering me ONE?!

gauntlet_max_baseball.speaker: Leo
gauntlet_max_baseball.text: Justin, keep your brother away from us!

gauntlet_max_baseball.speaker: Justin
gauntlet_max_baseball.text: Sorry Leo — he goes electric when he smells sugar.

gauntlet_max_win.speaker: MJ
gauntlet_max_win.text: My brother needs to find a hobby that isn't blocking roads.

gauntlet_nora_win.speaker: Carson
gauntlet_nora_win.text: She's gonna be in those bushes again next time. I know it.

gauntlet_max_baseball_win.speaker: Leo
gauntlet_max_baseball_win.text: Somebody get Justin's brother some actual batteries.

gauntlet_max_baseball_win.speaker: Justin
gauntlet_max_baseball_win.text: THIS WAS SO WORTH IT. LET'S GO.

gauntlet_edie.speaker: Edie
gauntlet_edie.text: Donuts? From DONUT HOUSE? And you didn't bring me any?!

gauntlet_edie.speaker: Edie
gauntlet_edie.text: Nope. You get past me, you can keep them. But you won't.

gauntlet_edie.speaker: Leo
gauntlet_edie.text: I've fought everyone on this block today. You're next.

edie_defeated.speaker: Leo
edie_defeated.text: Edie... it's over. We earned these donuts.

edie_defeated.speaker: Leo
edie_defeated.text: Nobody is taking them from us.

return_journey.speaker: Leo
return_journey.text: Got the donuts. Let's get home before anyone notices.

return_journey.speaker: Justin
return_journey.text: Wait. Are those... Grace? And Max? AND NORA?!

return_journey.speaker: Leo
return_journey.text: They want our donuts. RIDE. NOW.

return_journey.speaker: Warren
return_journey.text: I knew this was too easy.
